meaning: n.巢,窝,休息所,隐匿处,舒适的地方,(可以一个套一个的)一套器具vi.筑巢,找鸟巢vt.造巢,使套入
examples: I can see an eagle's nest on the rocks.
The owl seems to have deserted its nest.
Some species may nest in close proximity to each other.
All these nest eggs of Berkshire Hathaway shares are the trust funds of the ordinary shareholders.
And financially, working makes big sense when it comes to making sure your nest egg lasts.
